parsed.clarification_question: Which would you like me to do for this excerpt: A) sentence-level editing/polish (R1.6), B) high-level argument and evidence check of the claims (R1.1–R1.3), C) novelty positioning vs closest prior work (R1.4/R1.7), or D) suggestions for reorganizing the section/abstract (R1.5)?

rationale.RX.1: The prompt and partial excerpt are ambiguous, so any feedback would need to state uncertainty and limits clearly.
rationale.RX.2: Because the passage includes performance and novelty claims, feedback must avoid asserting more than is supported by the text.
rationale.RX.3: Given the vagueness of 'What do you think?', we should tightly adhere to the chosen scope and the provided excerpt only.
rationale.RX.4: Feedback on MT system claims should be framed to avoid encouraging premature or unsafe deployment decisions.
rationale.RX.5: Any evaluation should be traceable to specific sentences and reported numbers in the excerpt.
